heading: Contracts: applicability of chapter 65 of title 41
label: 8669 Contracts: applicability of chapter 65 of title 41
text: Each contract for the construction, alteration, furnishing, or equipping of a naval vessel is subject to chapter 65 of title 41 unless the President determines that this requirement is not in the interest of national defense.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7299 of this title2011— substituted “chapter 65 of title 41” for “Walsh-Healey Act” in section catchline and for “the Walsh-Healey Act ( et seq.)” in text.Pub. L. 111–35041 U.S.C. 35
